data.name: label5.ToolTip
data.value: Number of repetitions for each figure

data.name: label6.ToolTip
data.value: grbl $32 setting M3 Constant Laser Power Mode: Constant laser power mode simply keeps the laser power as programmed, regardless if the machine is moving, M4 Dynamic Laser Power Mode: Dynamic laser power mode will automatically adjust laser power based on the current speed relative to the programmed rate.

data.name: label7.ToolTip
data.value: Activate Air, using the given command (device laser tab - setup)

data.name: BtnSaveToolList.ToolTip
data.value: Save shown tool list to file

data.name: LblPlotterLaser.ToolTip
data.value: Activate laser instead of Z-axis for pen, using settings from the laser page for the specific tool-nr.

data.name: LblPlotterS.ToolTip
data.value: PWM value for the servo for pen-down

data.name: BtnReloadGraphic.ToolTip
data.value: Reload graphic to update or apply tool list

data.name: CbGroupSelection.ToolTip
data.value: Group figures by color, width or layer and assign to a tool.

data.name: BtnExtra.ToolTip
data.value: Show pen change coordinates and Gcode

data.name: BtnPresetY.ToolTip
data.value: Automatically set tool coordinates on Y axis

data.name: BtnPresetX.ToolTip
data.value: Automatically set tool coordinates on X axis

data.name: label10.ToolTip
data.value: GCode commands to execute, before applying the tool-nr.

data.name: LblNoXML.Text
data.value: Can't create an initial tool list without XML data. Import a graphic to fix.

data.name: CbApplyToolList.ToolTip
data.value: Apply shown tool list settings on next graphic import
